Resume

Hi, my name is

Pavan Patil

I build intelligent robotic systems.

Robotics engineer specializing in autonomous systems, perception, and real-world robotic applications.

View Work Get In Touch

01.About

I’m a robotics engineer focused on designing autonomous systems that can perceive, plan, and act in uncertain environments.

My work combines robust software architecture with practical field testing, from sensor fusion and SLAM pipelines to embedded control loops and deployment-ready tooling.

Technologies I work with most often:

  • ROS2
  • C++
  • Python
  • LiDAR
  • SLAM
  • Embedded Systems
  • Computer Vision

02.Experience

Staff Research Engineer @ Gahan AI

Jan 2026 – Present

Leading robotics research and development initiatives, focusing on advancing autonomous systems, perception pipelines, and real-time robotic applications. Driving technical excellence and mentoring the research team.

Robotics Research Engineer II @ Gahan AI

May 2025 – Dec 2025

Developed and optimized robot perception stacks, implemented ROS2-based navigation systems, and contributed to Nav2 framework enhancements. Collaborated on sensor fusion and SLAM algorithm improvements.

Robotics Research Intern @ Gahan AI

Dec 2024 – Apr 2025

Engaged with cutting-edge robotics research, implemented Docker-based deployment solutions, and contributed to ROS system architecture and optimization.

Physical Internship @ KLE Technological University and C.A.S.E

Jan 2024 – July 2024

Engaged in hands-on exploration and implementation of algorithms aimed at enabling robots to autonomously navigate through complex surroundings, addressing challenges such as obstacle avoidance and efficient path optimization.

Virtual Internship @ AICTE and Mathworks

May 2023 – Sep 2023

Developed proficiency in machine learning algorithms, deep learning techniques, and neural network architectures using industry-standard tools like MATLAB and Simulink provided by Mathworks.

03.Work

Autonomous Navigational Robot

Integrated GPS RTK and LiDAR sensors for advanced navigation and obstacle detection, leveraging ROS for real-time communication between mechanical subsystems.

MATLAB | ROS | LiDAR

GitHub →

Home Surveillance System

Led the design of a home surveillance system, integrating mechanical and electronic components with a focus on real-world adaptability using ESP32 modules.

ESP32 | CV

GitHub →

Delta Robot

Derived the inverse kinematics for the 4-DOF delta robot and designed physical and software architectures using MATLAB System Composer.

MATLAB | SolidWorks

GitHub →
